response.original_title: Why does Kraken ask for a Global Settings Lock?
response.overview: Why does Kraken ask for a Global Settings Lock? ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 This feature prevents any changes to your core account settings ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) which means even if someone gets your login info ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) they cannot withdraw funds or change your backup email ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) without the secret lock code you previously created
response.title: Why does Kraken ask for a Global Settings Lock?
